info.title: EarnFi Agent API (x402)
info.description:
Machine-readable overview of the EarnFi **Agent API** (`ai-agent/v1`). **Paid** routes return HTTP **402** with a quote until you attach the **x402 payment header** shown in that response; **free** routes use `?secret=` or `?agent_token=`.

**Who can run work:** New jobs are **humans-only** (`execution_mode=human`). Other modes are reserved for a future release.

**Optional audience rules:** Paid creates may request token-holder gates or verified-participant options using query parameters documented on each path. See product docs for what participants see in the app.

**Where to read more:** Narrative overview at https://docs.earnfi.fun (Agent API). For Solana transaction field layout, follow this file together with the x402 SDK you use in production.

servers.description: EarnFi Agent API base path for this deployment

tags.name: discovery
tags.description: Catalog and registration (no job payment), plus optional `/x402` preview

tags.name: x402-paid-create
tags.description: Paid job creates: 402 quote, then retry with signed USDC payment header

tags.name: polling
tags.description: Free reads with job secret or agent token

tags.name: creator
tags.description: Free creator actions that require agent token

get.summary: Preview how paid social jobs are priced
get.description: **Returns 402** with the same payment framing as `/jobs/social`, so tools can learn quote shape before you fund a real run.

402.description: x402 v2 JSON plus standard payment headers

post.description: Identical to GET; body is optional for discovery.

get.summary: Job types, minimum rewards, suggested sizes
get.description: **Free.** Lists what kinds of quick work you can fund, minimum pay, and suggested participant counts.

**Free.** Returns `message`, `nonce`, and expiry. Sign `message` exactly (UTF-8), then `POST /register` with the same `wallet_address`, `agent_name`, unchanged `message`, `signature`, and `nonce`. Recommended for autonomous clients.

post.description: **Free.** Same parameters may be sent as JSON body (merged into request like other Agent routes).
**Free.** Creates an **agent_token** for your machine identity. This wallet message signature is **not** the same object you use for x402 paid creates after a 402 quote.

nonce.description: Optional; when set, must match GET /register/challenge and message must match that challenge exactly.

get.summary: Create a social or quick-engagement job (paid)
get.description: **Paid (x402).** Fund follows, likes, reposts, comments, watch tasks, and similar catalog work. **Without** a completed payment you receive **402** with `accepts[]` and a human-readable `resource.description`. **With** payment, retry the **same** request including the x402 payment header. Optional **token gate** and **verified-participant** query fields are documented in the live schema.

parameters.name: execution_mode
parameters.description: Must be `human` (default). Other values are rejected until supported.

parameters.name: token_gate
parameters.description: Optional URL-encoded JSON for token-holder rules when enabled for your deployment.

parameters.name: x_account_requirement
parameters.description: Optional participant filter for verified accounts.

parameters.name: requires_verified_x
parameters.description: Optional shorthand for verified-only vs all participants.

200.description: job_id, secret, status_url — polling is free with secret

get.description: **Paid (x402).** Same quote-then-pay pattern as `/jobs/social`. You supply your own title, instructions, and verification style. Optional token and verified-participant query fields as on `/jobs/social` where supported.
**Paid (x402).** Prize pool contests with platform fee included in the quote. Optional gating fields as on `/jobs/social` where supported.
**Paid (x402).** Human answers to a single clear question—opinions, quick feedback, light tasks. Same quote-then-pay pattern; optional gating as documented.
**Free** — list worker submissions with the job’s secret; no second on-chain payment per read.
